title: Custom Gift Card Packages
description: What customizable gift‑card packages are offered for businesses using the Easy Commerce suite, including quantities, denominations, themes, and personalization options?
narrative: The user wants a detailed overview of Solumag's gift‑card offerings that integrate with Easy Commerce software (e.g., Easy Resto, Easy Boulangerie, Easy Livraison). Relevant information includes the available pack sizes (100‑card and 500‑card packs), the distribution of denominations (10 €, 20 €, 50 €, 100 €), the themed card designs (Christmas, Easter, Mother’s Day, etc.), and the options for printing the business name on the front or back of the cards. Documents that describe these specifications, customization possibilities, and compatibility with Easy Commerce are considered relevant.

title: Cressonnette Sprouting
description: How can I successfully germinate cressonnette (meadow cress) seeds and incorporate the sprouts into healthy recipes?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive guide that covers the step‑by‑step process for sprouting cressonnette seeds, including required supplies, timing, watering, and troubleshooting, as well as the nutritional profile of the sprouts and practical culinary ideas (e.g., salads, soups, sandwiches, sauces). Relevant documents must describe the germination method, seed characteristics, storage tips, and suggested uses in dishes, while excluding unrelated blog content about other seeds, events, or products.

title: Scalextric Digital Chip Availability
description: Where can I find used Scalextric Digital F1 chips for sale in Belgium and what price range should I expect?
narrative: The user is looking for second‑hand Scalextric Digital chips (especially the F1‑type chip) offered on Belgian resale sites such as Secondemain, eBay, and Amazon. Relevant documents should mention listings, prices, condition (new, like‑new, or used), shipping options within Belgium, and compatibility with specific Scalextric models (e.g., Lotus, C2736D, C8516). Documents that only discuss unrelated car manufacturers, audio equipment, or generic Scalextric accessories without chip details are not relevant.

title: Private Veau Chef

narrative: The user is seeking a private culinary service that can recreate the classic French Veau Marengo stew, using authentic ingredients and traditional cooking methods. title: Custom Car Cover

narrative: The user seeks guidance on selecting an indoor protective cover specifically for a vintage Porsche 911. Relevant information must cover the breathable lycra fabric, soft scratch‑resistant inner face, customization options such as logo printing and color choices, and any price or sizing details provided in the documents.

title: Ohlone Canoe Alcatraz
description: What are the historical background, construction methods, and cultural significance of the Ohlone tule‑reed canoe that sailed to Alcatraz for the 50th anniversary of the Indian occupation?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the Ohlone‑built canoe used in the 2024 Alcatraz commemorative voyage, including the traditional tule‑reed building process, the people involved (e.g., Antonio Moreno and Alfonso Ramirez), the connection to the 1969‑71 occupation, and the event’s purpose in Indigenous pride and climate activism. Documents that describe the canoe’s construction, launch details, participant motivations, and the broader Indigenous Peoples Day context are considered relevant.

title: SUV VTC Eligibility
description: Can a sport‑utility vehicle be used as a VTC (tourist transport with driver) under French law, and what technical and regulatory requirements must it satisfy?
narrative: The user wants information to determine whether an SUV meets the French VTC regulations (seat limits, vehicle age, inspection, marking, and driver qualifications) and to understand which SUV sizes or models could comply. Relevant content includes the SUV classification details (size, seating capacity) and Decree No. 2009‑1652 governing passenger‑car VTC operations.

title: French Heatwave Red Alert
description: What specific actions are required for schools in French departments that are placed under a red heatwave (canicule) alert?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on official measures applied to schools when a red heatwave alert is issued in France, including whether schools must close, the conditions under which they can remain open, allowed activities, and any guidance from the Ministry of Education or prefectural authorities. Relevant documents should mention red‑alert departments, Ministry statements about school closures or limited physical activity, and examples of local implementation (e.g., specific communes that closed schools). Documents that only discuss orange alerts, general weather forecasts, or unrelated topics (e.g., Ukraine, historical census, marine corps) are not relevant.

title: Belgian Unemployment Stats
description: What were the numbers of unemployed persons receiving benefits in Belgium in November 2016, broken down by region, age group, and duration of unemployment?
narrative: The user wants detailed statistical information on unemployment benefit recipients for November 2016 in Belgium. Relevant documents must include total recipients, the breakdown by Flemish, Walloon, and Brussels regions, age‑group changes (e.g., under 25, 25‑49, 50‑59, 60‑65), and the proportion of recipients by length of unemployment (<1 year, 1‑2 years, ≥2 years), along with any reported percentage changes from the previous year and notes on regulatory factors affecting the figures.

title: Client Portal Access
description: How can I reset my password or recover access to my online client space for banking, utility, and construction services?
narrative: The user wants detailed, step‑by‑step instructions for regaining entry to the client areas of AXA Bank, Saur (utility), and LMP Builder. title: Premium EV Rental

title: Swiss Early Potato Outlook
description: What are the recent trends, weather impacts, and market conditions affecting early potato production in Switzerland?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on early potato crops in Switzerland, including planting timelines, weather‑related delays, area statistics, price or organic certification details, market demand, and any relevant agronomic innovations (e.g., new fungicides or decision‑support tools). Relevant documents should describe weekly early‑potato bulletins, 2021‑2022 planting data, climate effects on emergence, market price trends, and recent product approvals that could influence early‑season management.

title: Light Symbolism
description: What are the meanings and contexts of “light” imagery in theological writings, New‑Age abduction narratives, and contemporary music/artistic personas?
narrative: The user seeks an overview that connects three domains: (1) the theological concept of the empyrean as a radiant heaven of fire; (2) New‑Age accounts of “beings of light” and abduction experiences such as Monique Mathieu’s story; and (3) modern musicians who adopt light‑related motifs in their branding and performances (e.g., Haru Nemuri’s “singing ultimate weapon” identity and Jaguar Jonze’s visual projects). Relevant passages must discuss the symbolic use of light, its spiritual or artistic interpretation, and any related terminology (e.g., empyrean, “beasts of light”, “light pyramid”, “singing ultimate weapon”).

title: Newts Adaptation
description: What are the themes, staging choices, and critical reception of Knaïve Theatre's adaptation of Karel Čapek’s *War with the Newts*?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information about the recent stage production of *War with the Newts* by Knaïve Theatre, including how the adaptation interprets the original novel’s satire of capitalism and nationalism, descriptions of the set, sound, and immersive elements, and reviews or scholarly commentary that assess its artistic and social impact. description: What are the specifics of Brasserie des Légendes' takeover of the Biercée Distillery, such as the purchase price, court approval process, and implications for the companies involved?

title: Gender Gaps Education
description: What are the differences in secondary school enrollment rates between boys and girls across world regions?
narrative: The user is looking for information that explains how secondary education access varies by gender worldwide. Documents that mention UNESCO definitions of secondary cycles, gender‑specific enrollment figures, and analyses of why some regions show higher enrollment for boys or girls are considered relevant.

title: Free Product Testing France

description: What KIA car models can I rent at Tunisian airports, and what are their rates, vehicle age, and fuel consumption details?

description: What is the exact geographical centre of metropolitan France, and which nearby attractions or facilities (e.g., Parc Astérix, La Borne ceramics centre, electric‑car charging stations) can be found there?

title: Kiwi Plant Chlorosis
description: What are the most effective ways to diagnose and treat chlorosis in Actinidia kiwi (Soreli and Belen) grown in alkaline, clay‑rich soils with high fertilizer levels?
narrative: The user is seeking practical, science‑based guidance for identifying the cause of chlorosis‑like symptoms (leaf edge browning, purplish veins, necrotic spots) on kiwi vines and applying appropriate remedial actions. Relevant documents should discuss soil pH effects, nutrient deficiencies (especially iron, magnesium, potassium), fertilizer excess, root aeration, wind stress, and disease possibilities such as Phytophthora. Answers that provide diagnostic steps, soil amendment recommendations, watering/drainage improvements, wind‑break strategies, and safe fertilizer adjustments will be considered relevant, while generic kiwi‑growing tips without focus on chlorosis treatment will not.

title: Free Racing Games
description: What free online driving or racing games are similar to Highway Racer?
narrative: The user is looking for browser‑based, no‑download games that let them race or drive cars, like Highway Racer. title: Mobility Budget Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility requirements, fiscal and social treatment, and practical implementation details of the Belgian mobility budget and the French Sustainable Mobility Package for employees?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive overview of how employer‑provided mobility budgets work in Belgium and France, including the legal preconditions for both employers and workers, the three pillars of the budget (environmentally friendly car, sustainable transport, cash balance), the calculation of the budget based on total cost of ownership, and the associated tax and social security implications. Relevant material must describe the eligibility criteria (e.g., 36‑month car provision, 3‑month employee tenure, exceptions for promotions), the environmental standards for qualifying cars, the permissible uses of the remaining budget (public transport, bike, car‑sharing, housing subsidies, etc.), and the treatment of the cash balance. Comparisons between the Belgian mobility budget and the French Sustainable Mobility Package (budget caps, reimbursement rules, integration with existing transport ticket reimbursements) are also considered relevant.
